name: qlab-timer
description: QLab timer display powered by Bitfocus Companion variables

scripts.dist:all: rm -rf dist && npm run dist:mac:silicon && npm run dist:mac:intel && npm run dist:win && npm run clean:dist:final
scripts.dist:mac:silicon: electron-builder --mac dmg --arm64 && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const v=require('./package.json').version;const dist='dist';const src=path.join(dist,'QLab Timer-'+v+'-arm64.dmg');const dst=path.join(dist,'QLab Timer-macOS-Apple-Silicon-'+v+'.dmg');if(fs.existsSync(src)){if(fs.existsSync(dst))fs.rmSync(dst,{force:true});fs.renameSync(src,dst);}const blockmap=src+'.blockmap';if(fs.existsSync(blockmap))fs.rmSync(blockmap,{force:true});"
scripts.dist:mac:intel: electron-builder --mac dmg --x64 && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const v=require('./package.json').version;const dist='dist';const src=path.join(dist,'QLab Timer-'+v+'.dmg');const dst=path.join(dist,'QLab Timer-macOS-Intel-'+v+'.dmg');if(fs.existsSync(src)){if(fs.existsSync(dst))fs.rmSync(dst,{force:true});fs.renameSync(src,dst);}const blockmap=src+'.blockmap';if(fs.existsSync(blockmap))fs.rmSync(blockmap,{force:true});"
scripts.dist:mac:release: node -e "const required=['APPLE_ID','APPLE_APP_SPECIFIC_PASSWORD','APPLE_TEAM_ID','CSC_NAME']; const missing=required.filter((key)=>!process.env[key]); if(missing.length){console.error('Missing release env vars: ' + missing.join(', ')); process.exit(1);}" && electron-builder --mac dmg --arm64
scripts.dist:win: electron-builder --win && cp 'build/README-INSTALL-WINDOWS.txt' 'dist/README-INSTALL-WINDOWS.txt' && cd dist && zip -j -q -FS "QLab Timer-Windows-Setup-$npm_package_version.zip" "QLab Timer Setup $npm_package_version.exe" README-INSTALL-WINDOWS.txt
scripts.clean:dist:final: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const version=require('./package.json').version;const keep=new Set(['QLab Timer-macOS-Apple-Silicon-'+version+'.dmg','QLab Timer-macOS-Intel-'+version+'.dmg','QLab Timer-Windows-Setup-'+version+'.zip']);const dist='dist';if(!fs.existsSync(dist)){process.exit(0);}for(const entry of fs.readdirSync(dist)){if(!keep.has(entry)){fs.rmSync(path.join(dist,entry),{recursive:true,force:true});}}"
